questionHtml: Flux leakage is one reason why a transformer may not be ideal. Explain the effect of flux leakage on the transformer.
markschemeHtml:
the secondary coil does not enclose all flux «lines from core» ✓

induced emf in secondary
OR
power transferred to the secondary
OR
efficiency is less than expected ✓


Award [0] for references to eddy currents/heating of the core as the reason.

Award MP2 if no reason stated.

meta.title: Flux leakage is one reason why a transformer may not be ideal. Explain the effect of flux leakage on the transformer.
